name: MOJO Organics, Inc.
summary: MOJO Organics, Inc. engages in the product development, production, marketing, distribution, and sale of beverages. The company's flagship product is MOJO pure coconut water. It also produces sparkling coconut water, coconut water + mango juice, coconut water + pineapple juice, and pure organic coconut water. MOJO Organics, Inc. was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Jersey City, New Jersey.
